title: eria minutiflora
intro: Eria minutiflora, also known as the Small-flowered Eria, is a flowering plant species in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eria minutiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. Eria minutiflora is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
